name: paged-image-view
title: Paged Image View
description: A swipeable image carousel — one image per page, bottom-center page dots, and tap-to-jump paging. Fills whatever size you give it.

variants.title: Fill
variants.description: Images fill the frame, cropping to fit. The default.

variants.title: Fit
variants.description: Images scale to fit without cropping.
